title: Senior Financial Analyst - Piramal Finance South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Piramal Finance South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Piramal Finance South Asia Partners in Nashik is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Piramal Finance South Asia Partners:
Piramal Finance South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance South Asia Partners!
